hero.subtitle: Lighting study and design, photometric study, custom 3D simulation... Every space: apartment, villa, hotel, office, residence, restaurant...
hero.card_subtitle: From photometric study to the final render.

about.label: ABOUT US
about.title: Lighting is our craft, comfort is our signature.
about.body: At Volta & Lighting, we believe lighting isn't a detail — it's the soul of a space. Every project starts with a rigorous study: usage analysis, photometric calculations, color temperature and CRI selection. We deliver precise plans, realistic 3D simulations and full support through commissioning.

services.label: OUR SERVICES
services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Full expertise, from study to delivery.

items.title: Photometric Study
items.description: Precise calculations of illuminance levels (lux), uniformity, glare (UGR) — compliant with EN 12464 standards. Every space receives exactly the light it deserves.

items.title: AutoCAD Lighting Plans
items.description: Detailed technical drawings in AutoCAD format: luminaire placement, circuits, dimensions. Clear documents ready for use by your electricians.

items.title: 3D Simulation & Renders
items.description: Visualize your project before construction. Photorealistic DIALux / Relux renders with light level mapping — what you see is what you'll get.

items.title: Consulting & Support
items.description: Color temperature selection (2700K–4000K), rendering indices (CRI ≥ 90), luminaire curation. We support you at every step, through final on-site tuning.

why.label: WHY LIGHTING MATTERS
why.title: More than ambiance — a business lever.
why.subtitle: Lighting directly impacts your revenue, client wellbeing and operating costs. The numbers speak.
why.resto_title: +22% longer table dwell time with warm lighting.
why.cri_title: CRI ≥ 90 — because your products deserve to be seen.
why.cri_body: The Color Rendering Index (CRI) determines whether food, fabrics and materials appear natural. Under poor CRI, red meat looks grey, dishes look dull. We exclusively specify CRI ≥ 90 and R9 ≥ 80 sources for faithful color rendering.

process.label: OUR PROCESS
process.title: From idea to light — in 4 steps.

steps.title: Analysis
steps.desc: Site visit, understanding usages, defining desired atmospheres.

steps.title: Study
steps.desc: Photometric calculations, DIALux simulations, luminaire selection.

steps.title: Plans
steps.desc: AutoCAD deliverables: placement, circuits, technical data sheets.

steps.title: Follow-up
steps.desc: Site support, on-site tuning, final project commissioning.

projects.label: PROJECTS
projects.title: Our Projects
projects.subtitle: Spaces transformed by light.
projects.map_subtitle: Projects delivered in 42 wilayas out of 58.

items.name: Karim B.
items.text: The photometric study completely transformed my restaurant's atmosphere. Customers stay longer and come back. Professional work, impeccable deliverables.

items.name: Leila M.
items.text: I collaborate regularly with Volta & Lighting. Their technical mastery and attention to detail make the difference on every project. Indispensable.

items.name: Samir R.
items.text: Complete overhaul of our office lighting. Incomparable visual comfort, more productive teams, consumption cut in half. Fast ROI.

items.q: How much does a lighting study cost?
items.a: The price depends on the area, complexity and deliverable level. We provide a free quote within 48h after an initial discussion.
For a standard residential project, expect 5 to 10 business days. For a commercial project (restaurant, office), 2 to 4 weeks depending on complexity.

items.q: Do you also supply the luminaires?
items.a: Our core business is study and design. We recommend luminaires from partner brands and can assist you with purchasing.

items.q: Do you work across all of Algeria?
items.a: Yes. We work throughout the country. For projects outside Oran, part of the work is done remotely with targeted site visits.
DIALux evo for photometric calculations and 3D simulations, AutoCAD for technical plans, Relux for certain validations.

contact.label: CONTACT
contact.title: Let's talk about your project.
contact.subtitle: Describe your space and your ambitions. We'll get back to you within 24h with an initial direction.
